## Beta Diversity Analysis
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# This initial code block loads custom utility functions and environment variables

# These are stored in separate files to keep the main analysis clean and organized
source(normalizePath("utils/r-utils.r"))

# Source beta diversity analysis functions
source("scripts/beta-diversity-analysis.r")

source(normalizePath("_environment.required"))
load(normalizePath("data/seqdata.RData"))

base_b12 <- readRDS(file.path(RESULTS, "B12-status-subgroup-analysis/b12-baseline-seqdata.rds"))

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(vegan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ComplexHeatmap))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pairwiseAdonis))

dir.create(file.path(RESULTS, "B12-status-subgroup-analysis"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

This analysis examines how bacterial communities differ between samples across different B12 status groupings.

### Define grouping configurations

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| label: config

group_configs <- list(
  tertiles = list(
    var_name = "b12_tertiles",
    title = "B12 Status: Tertiles",
    description = "Analysis of B12 status divided into tertiles"
  ),
  binary = list(
    var_name = "b12_2Lev",
    title = "Binary level variable: Deficiency (<148 pmol/L)",
    description = "Analysis of B12 deficiency using binary classification"
  ),
  three_level = list(
    var_name = "b12_3Lev",
    title = "Three level variable: Insufficiency (≥148 & <221)",
    description = "Analysis of B12 status using three-level classification"
  )
)
```

### Run analysis for all groups

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| label: fig-mds
#| results: asis
#| fig-cap: "Metric Multidimensional Scaling (NMDS) ordination plots showing beta diversity patterns across B12 status groups using different distance metrics"
#| fig-width: 18

results <- analyze_all_groups(base_b12, group_configs)
```

### Session Information

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| label: session-info

sessionInfo()
```
